caption: A man is seated in a studio setting, wearing a white baseball cap, a black hoodie with the words "BOSS TALK" in gold lettering, a gold chain, and a gold watch. He wears headphones and is positioned behind a microphone on a swivel arm. Behind him is a white wall featuring repeated logos that say "UNIQUE HUSTLE" accompanied by five gold stars. To his right, a blue and red sign reads "BOSS TALK" and "Where BOSSES Talk!". A black mug with a red and white "BOSS TALK" logo sits on the table in front of him. Across the frames, the man remains seated and looks toward someone off-screen to his left. His facial expression remains relatively neutral, and his body position stays consistent, showing minimal movement as he listens or prepares to speak.
